behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names .npmrc files, min-release-age=7, engines npm >=11.10.0, CLAUDE.md 'Dependency Policy' section, and supply-chain language tested.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction specifies the required config values but not exact file format/structure beyond what's needed; agent still must edit JSON, create files, and write prose.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for substring 'min-release-age=7', '11.10' in engines.npm, and section title—flexible to alternative valid fixes.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke 'npm config get', 'npm install', 'npm run type:check', and 'npm run lint' as subprocesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each assertion requires the actual config/engines/doc changes; a stub cannot satisfy npm config get or typecheck/lint runs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All requirements in instruction (npmrc, engines, CLAUDE.md section, preservation of sections and scripts) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers for fail-to-pass behavioral, structural, documentation, and pass-to-pass sections.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data output.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references obvious config files (.npmrc, package.json, CLAUDE.md) which are the task subject; no hidden localization concern.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Solution adds engines field and creates small .npmrc files without rewriting; localized edits.
